name: Virtualization and Sandbox Evasion Check
description: Detects processes checking for virtual machine or sandbox environments
query:
// Detect VM/sandbox detection techniques
// Trigger on queries for VM indicators
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(systeminfo.*Virtual|wmic.*bios.*VMware|vboxmanage|VBoxService|vmtoolsd|reg.*query.*SystemBiosVersion|Get-WmiObject.*Win32_ComputerSystem.*Model)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 1
within 120 seconds
